title: Clientside QoL
description: A fully client-side yet extensive quality-of-life modpack featuring client-side inventory sorting, map and minimap, saturation bar, vanilla+ resource packs,  performance tweaks, shader packs, and much more!
body:
# What this is
This is a fully **client-side** modpack that gives you:
- Performance
- Ready-to-Play with tweaking and configuring
- Fully client-side inventory sorting, and client-side inventory tweaks (through MouseWheelie and others)
- "Fair-play" freecram (tl;dr does not allow you to phase through blocks)
- Minimap and fullscreen map using JourneyMap
- Waypoints using JourneyMap
- Configured resource packs
- Preloaded Shaders
- and much more!

## Credits and Attributions and Notes

Based on the Simply Optimized modpack by hzsa [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop)

Currently still tweaking and things may change or break. You can contact me on discord at @hamb_y if you have bug reports and feature requests.
